title: Terraphim AI
description: Privacy-first, deterministic AI assistant built with Rust. 56-crate workspace featuring knowledge graph learning systems, Aho-Corasick text matching, multi-agent orchestration, and MCP server integration. Operates entirely on local infrastructure.

title: The Pattern
description: Machine Learning NLP pipeline for knowledge discovery using Redis ecosystem. Combines VR/AR interfaces with AI to fight information complexity and enable spatial information exploration.

title: Blockchain-Inspired Distributed System
description: Led team to build innovative distributed system resulting in a technology patent. Demonstrated systematic approach to innovation and ability to inspire teams to achieve breakthrough results.

title: Loan Management Platform
description: Full-stack loan management platform with Rust/WASM financial calculations, borrower portal, CRM integration, and immutable audit trails. Eight microservices with event-driven architecture.

title: Digital Synthetic Twins
description: Rust-based platform providing high-fidelity mock implementations of third-party APIs for offline development, deterministic testing, and cost-free experimentation. Drop-in compatible with official SDKs.

title: Signal Intelligence Service Layer
description: Service layer migration integrating AI capabilities with existing signal intelligence infrastructure. Bedrock integration with automated deployment pipeline.

title: TruthForge
description: Bias detection and narrative intelligence platform for responsible AI validation. Debate arena for multi-perspective analysis with structured verdict framework.
